narrative:
Deercreek (precinct in Madison County) has 594 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.6 percentage points.
